mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_group_relations WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_group_relations WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE user_group_relations SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE group_id = #{groupId}
UPDATE user_group_relations SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
